name: nasa-apod-gallery
description: nasa_apod returns {hdurl, url, title, explanation, date, media_type, copyright}. hdurl is a direct high-res image URL (JPEG/PNG). Use 'count' param for multiple random APODs or 'start_date'/'end_date' for a date range.
data_shape: array of {hdurl: string, url: string, title: string, explanation: string, date: string, media_type: string, copyright?: string}

name: nasa-mars-rover
description: nasa_mars_rover returns photos from Curiosity/Perseverance/Opportunity/Spirit. Each photo has {img_src, earth_date, sol, camera: {name, full_name}, rover: {name}}. img_src is a direct JPEG URL.
data_shape: array of {id: number, img_src: string, earth_date: string, sol: number, camera: {name: string, full_name: string}, rover: {name: string}}

name: nasa-neo-dashboard
description: nasa_neo returns near-Earth objects with orbital data and hazard assessment. Each NEO has {name, estimated_diameter (min/max in km/m), is_potentially_hazardous_asteroid, close_approach_data: [{close_approach_date, relative_velocity.kilometers_per_hour, miss_distance.kilometers}]}.
data_shape: array of {name: string, estimated_diameter: {kilometers: {min: number, max: number}}, is_potentially_hazardous_asteroid: boolean, close_approach_data: [{close_approach_date: string, relative_velocity: {kilometers_per_hour: string}, miss_distance: {kilometers: string}}]}
